boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Aggiunge <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> a fine mossa (un punto per casella)
boonClickbaitDescription: Aggiunge <multi>+2 Multi</multi> per ogni rilancio del negozio in questa run (attuale <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
